settings.title: Settings
common.label: Label
landingHeroTagline: Manage your assets with precision and confidence.
landingHeroDescription: Centralize your fixed assets, automate depreciation calculations, and track all your assets from a single platform.
landingFeaturesSubtitle: The modules available in OKAPI Immobilisations to manage your entire asset portfolio.
landingFeatureAssetsDesc: Register, view, and update your fixed assets (vehicles, machines, equipment) with detailed records and inventory.
landingFeatureDepreciationDesc: Calculate depreciation, manage accounting rules, view schedules, and generate accounting entries.
landingFeatureMovementsDesc: Track assignments, transfers, returns, disposals, and asset removals with full history.
landingFeatureBreakdownsDesc: Report breakdowns, track technician interventions, and review repair history.
landingFeatureMaintenanceDesc: Schedule preventive maintenance, view the planning calendar, and handle overdue alerts.
landingFeaturePartsDesc: Manage the parts catalogue, stock movements, pending needs, and supplies.
landingFeatureValidationsDesc: Process pending approval requests and review the history of approved or rejected decisions.
landingFeatureReportsDesc: Export financial, technical, and depreciation reports to manage your asset portfolio.
landingFeatureUsersDesc: Manage accounts, assign roles, and control access based on business profiles.
landingFooterAbout: Fixed Assets Management and Automatic Depreciation Calculation System.
landingFooterCopyright: © 2026 — Fixed Assets Management and Automatic Depreciation Calculation System

assets.componentsDesc: Allocation compliant with AUDCIF article 38-1 for differentiated depreciation. Each significant component can have its own depreciation period.
assets.depreciationsDesc: History of depreciations (6914/2944) and reversals (2944/7914). Cumulative depreciation is updated with each operation.
assets.movementsDesc: Complete tracking of transfers, assignments, disposals and asset removals. Compliant with audit and internal control requirements.
assets.estimatedDepreciation: Estimated depreciation • Full calculation available in Phase 6

ai.welcome:
Hello! I am the OKAPI VISION AI assistant. I can help you analyze your asset fleet. Ask me your questions!

Examples:
• Which assets should be replaced?
• Which parts need to be ordered?
• What is the fleet health?
• Which assets are fully depreciated?
ai.title: OKAPI VISION AI Assistant
ai.subtitle: Ask questions about your asset fleet
ai.error: Sorry, I could not process your question. Please try again.
ai.footer: The assistant analyzes real-time data (assets, breakdowns, maintenance, depreciation, stock)
ai.widgetPlaceholder: Ask a question about your asset fleet
ai.suggestion2: Which parts need to be ordered?
ai.suggestion5: Which assets are costly to maintain?
ai.example2: Which parts need to be ordered?
